name: Tuna with Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 13 ounces Canned tuna; drained and flaked
2 cups Frozen peas and carrots (or mixed vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in margarine until tender but not brown.
2. Stir in flour, chicken bouillion granules, salt, thyme, and pepper. Add milk and water.
3. Cook and stir until thick and bubbly. Stir in fish and cooked vegetables and parsley.
4. Heat until bubbly. Immediately pour into a 1 1/2 to 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Place biscuits on top and bake in a 400°F oven for about 10-12 minutes. (Cover the top with aluminum foil after 7-8 minutes to prevent it from getting too brown.)
6. Each serving provides: 1 vegetable, 1 fruit, 2 whole grains, 1 protein, and 5 optional calories. NOTE: If you change to a different meat or vegetables, you will have to adjust your exchanges, also with your biscuits.
